Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student user in the Navodaya Memories yearbook, storing their profile information and house affiliation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Student entity.

batchId.description: Reference to the Batch the student belongs to.

name.description: The full name of the student.

email.description: The email address of the student.

profilePhotoUrl.description: URL to the student's profile picture.

Memory.title: Memory
Memory.description: A personal recollection or story contributed by a student.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Memory entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the Student who contributed this memory.

studentName.description: The name of the student contributor for quick display.

title.description: A concise title for the memory.

description.description: The detailed text content of the memory.

classYearLabel.description: The academic class year this memory pertains to.

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the memory was uploaded.

Photo.title: Photo
Photo.description: An image asset stored for the media vault.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Photo entity.

url.description: The URL where the image file is stored.

caption.description: A brief caption for the photo.

uploadedByStudentId.description: Reference to the Student who uploaded this photo.

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the photo was uploaded.

/memories/{memoryId}.description: Root collection for all public memories (The Wall).

/photos/{photoId}.description: Root collection for all photos (Media Vault).
